item.name: Tales of Adventure: One Ninja's Journey IV
item.description:
A detailed record of one adventurer's continuing path to becoming a realm-renowned ninja─so detailed, in fact, that all who read it come to swear they experienced the events firsthand.

Use to instantly level ninja to 90 and complete all job quests and melee DPS role quests up through “To Calmer Seas.” Cannot be used outside large settlements. Automatic logout will commence upon usage.
